name: promptpile-mcp
description: Promptpile 与 MCP：stdio 会话 + 本机 HTTP 网关（launch / export-tools / exec-calls / check）

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/src/mcp-config.test.js dist/src/mcp/tool-name.test.js dist/src/http/execution.test.js dist/src/exec-calls/check-status.test.js dist/src/exec-calls/post-exec.test.js dist/src/exec-calls/scan-call-files.test.js dist/src/exec-calls/write-result-jsonl.test.js dist/src/commands/exec-calls.test.js
scripts.test:smoke: npm run build && npm run mcp:smoke
